raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of pi4j may not be compatible with Java 11 or the updated Spring Boot environment.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit guava dependency declaration.
Update the project version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove the execution of the Spring application context in the main method.
Add I2CFactory.UnsupportedBusNumberException to the catch block to handle potential exceptions from I2CFactory.getInstance().close().
Simplify the method body by removing an unnecessary intermediate variable assignment.
Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions object instead of direct setter calls on the factory.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Google API Services OAuth2 to v2-rev20200213-1.31.0 for updated API support.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older API versions may be deprecated or incompatible with newer Google services.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump project version to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the significant upgrade.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults where the application type is auto-detected.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the deprecated .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ conventions where web application type is auto-detected.
Remove commented-out code line for setting a device on the Pushover message builder.
Translate German error log message to English.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.before: logger.error("Pushover Nachricht konnte nicht erstellt und versendet werden. ", e);
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.after: logger.error("could not create Pushover message. ", e);

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Translate German info log message to English and correct the message text to match the context.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.before: logger.info("Pushover Nachricht wurde erfolgreich erstellt und versendet. {}", result.toString());
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.after: logger.info("could not create Pushover message: {}", result.toString());
